phrases.intent_en: Ask where the maritime exhibition is
phrases.cultural_note: The maritime exhibition displays local seafaring history.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao faroleiro ou na receção.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW fuh-roo-LAY-roo OHW NUH reh-sih-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the lighthouse keeper or at the reception.

responses.english: Ask the lighthouse keeper or at the reception.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW fuh-roo-LAY-roo OHW NUH reh-sih-SOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte ao faroleiro ou na receção.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the maritime exhibition is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a sala de exposições marítimas aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH muh-REE-tee-muhsh uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Maritime history is central to Nazaré's identity, often displayed locally.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na base da torre do farol.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH BAH-zih DUH TAW-rih DOO fuh-RAWL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the base of the lighthouse tower.

responses.english: Good morning, at the base of the lighthouse tower.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH BAH-zih DUH TAW-rih DOO fuh-RAWL.
responses.local: Bom dia, na base da torre do farol.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao monitor do local ou ao faroleiro na receção.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW moo-nee-TOHR DOO loo-KAHL OHW OW fuh-roo-LAY-roo NUH reh-sih-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the site monitor or the lighthouse keeper at the reception.

responses.english: Ask the site monitor or the lighthouse keeper at the reception.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW moo-nee-TOHR DOO loo-KAHL OHW OW fuh-roo-LAY-roo NUH reh-sih-SOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte ao monitor do local ou ao faroleiro na receção.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cliff-top kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde exatamente fica a banca no cimo do penhasco?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee (link z) ee-zah-tuh-MEN-tee FEE-kah-ah BAN-kah-noo SEE-moo-doo pen-YAS-koo
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese viewpoint kiosks typically sell local crafts and refreshments.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao miradouro principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's next to the main viewpoint.

responses.english: Good morning, it's next to the main viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao miradouro principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the old keeper's quarters are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os antigos aposentos do faroleiro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH ahnng-TEE-goosh uh-poo-ZAYNG-toosh DOO fuh-roo-LAY-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic keeper quarters are preserved as cultural heritage sites.

likely_response.local: Os antigos aposentos do faroleiro ficam no complexo do Farol da Nazaré.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH ahnng-TEE-goosh uh-poo-ZAYNG-toosh DOO fuh-roo-LAY-roo FEE-kuhng NOO koomp-LEHK-soo DOO fuh-RAWL DUH nuh-zuh-REH.
likely_response.translation_en: The old keeper's quarters are in the Nazaré Lighthouse complex.

responses.english: The old keeper's quarters are in the Nazaré Lighthouse complex.
responses.phonetic: OOSH ahnng-TEE-goosh uh-poo-ZAYNG-toosh DOO fuh-roo-LAY-roo FEE-kuhng NOO koomp-LEHK-soo DOO fuh-RAWL DUH nuh-zuh-REH.
responses.local: Os antigos aposentos do faroleiro ficam no complexo do Farol da Nazaré.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the funicular ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira do funicular?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Funicular tickets are sold at the base before ascent.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira do funicular.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the funicular ticket booth.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the funicular ticket booth.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO foo-nee-koo-LAHR.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira do funicular.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cliff-top kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde é que fica o quiosque no topo do penhasco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih NOO TAW-poo DOO peh-NYAHSH-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The cliff-top kiosk offers refreshments and souvenirs.

likely_response.local: Consulte o vendedor do quiosque ou o monitor do local. Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco.
likely_response.pronunciation: koong-SOOW-tih AW vayng-dih-DOHR DOO KEEOHSH-kih OHW AW moo-nee-TOHR DOO loo-KAHL. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Consult the kiosk vendor or the site monitor. Follow the signs to Miradouro do Suberco.

responses.english: Consult the kiosk vendor or the site monitor. Follow the signs to Miradouro do Suberco.
responses.phonetic: koong-SOOW-tih AW vayng-dih-DOHR DOO KEEOHSH-kih OHW AW moo-nee-TOHR DOO loo-KAHL. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-BEH-ruh-koo.
responses.local: Consulte o vendedor do quiosque ou o monitor do local. Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Suberco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the maritime exhibition is
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica a exposição marítima?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN muh-REE-tee-muh?
phrases.cultural_note: The maritime exhibition room is inside the lighthouse tower.

likely_response.local: Na sala de exposições marítimas, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH muh-REE-tee-muhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the maritime exhibition room, on the right.

responses.english: In the maritime exhibition room, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NUH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH muh-REE-tee-muhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Na sala de exposições marítimas, à direita.
